name: Authentic Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 cups long-grain rice, steamed and chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add the Chinese barbecued pork to the pan and stir-fry until browned.
3. Add the peas and cook for an additional minute.
4. Pour in the oil and swirl to coat the pan.
5. Stir in the steamed, chilled rice, salt, beaten eggs, and bean sprouts.
6. Toss everything together until well combined and heated through.
7. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
